mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox (routing_key, payload, status) VALUES (#{routingKey}, #{payload}, 'PENDING')
mapper.select: SELECT id, routing_key AS routingKey, payload, status FROM outbox WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM outbox WHERE status = 'SENT' AND created_at < #{olderThan}
